caption: Against a solid black background, four identical pink circles are arranged in a grid pattern, each containing a white capital letter "C" centered within it. The name "Christopher Albuquerque" appears in a small, white, sans-serif font in the middle-left and middle-right areas of the image, as well as in the bottom-left and bottom-right corners. Across the sequence of frames, there is no visible movement, change in positioning, or alteration of the visual elements. The layout remains perfectly static, with the pink circles and the repeated text "Christopher Albuquerque" staying in their exact positions throughout the clip. No people, clothing, or other objects are present in the scene.
